description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with four lint jobs using specific Docker images. The ansible-lint job uses the sdwolfz/ansible-lint:latest image, runs a before_script to chmod 700 ., then executes make lint/ansible. The editorconfig job uses sdwolfz/editorconfig-checker:latest and runs make lint/editorconfig. The shellcheck job uses sdwolfz/shellcheck:latest and runs make lint/shellcheck. The yamllint job uses sdwolfz/yamllint:latest and runs make lint/yamllint, all in the default stage with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
